top_signals.title: Aflac Follows Alphabet Into Japan’s Booming Yen Bond Market
top_signals.summary: US insurer Aflac Inc. on Thursday sold yen bonds totaling ¥65.9 billion ($415 million) across four tranches, joining a wave of foreign issuers tapping Japan’s credit market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Barr, Measuring Financial Health
top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Jump as Samsung Reaches Tentative Deal With Union
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks rallied after Samsung Electronics Co. reached a tentative deal with its labor union, defusing the threat of an imminent strike at the world’s largest memory chipmaker.
